news.headline: GOATT Golf Club introduces new app connecting golfers to private courses nationwide, revolutionizing golf experiences.
news.summary: In an exciting development, GOATT Golf Club has introduced a new app in Milwaukee, Wis., on Jan. 9, 2025. The innovative app, named after "Greatest of All Tee Times", offers a unique experience for golfers. Exclusively available to club members, this platform revolutionizes the game by providing access to previously unexplored playing locations. This groundbreaking app aims to enhance the golfing experience for members by offering a fresh perspective on the game.

news.headline: Toshiba and Qualcomm team up to pioneer AI-powered IoT solutions for retail industry innovation.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between Toshiba and Qualcomm to introduce innovative and scalable AI-powered IoT solutions for the retail sector. The partnership aims to leverage advanced technologies to enhance the retail experience.

news.headline: Real estate investor sentiment drops by 27% as challenges like high finance costs and limited inventory persist. Unenthusiastic about Trump's proposals.
news.summary: In South Windsor, Connecticut, as of January 9, 2025, real estate investors are facing a multitude of challenges including insurance problems, high finance costs, limited inventory, and escalating home prices. The sentiment among investors has decreased by 27% due to concerns over Trump's plans for increased tariffs and mass deportations. These issues are impacting the real estate market alongside notable figures such as a decrease in investor confidence and rising costs in the industry.

news.headline: Talkdesk introduces AI Agents for Retail to enhance customer experience, bringing automation to operations. #AIAgents #CustomerService
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Talkdesk unveiled Talkdesk AI Agents for Retail, showcasing AI capabilities that automate customer service operations in the retail sector. This new offering aims to enhance efficiency and streamline processes within retail customer service using intelligent AI technology.

news.headline: Research report predicts evolution of Mobility-as-a-Service, focusing on factors like regulations, partnerships, and consumer acceptance.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "The Evolution from Mobility-as-a-Service to Mobility-as-a-Feature" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report discusses the potential of Mobility-as-a-Feature (MaaF) solutions, emphasizing the need for various elements to converge for their widespread success. These elements include regulations, contractual frameworks, technology, partnerships, consumer acceptance, and public sector support. MaaF, a concept introduced by David A. Hensher, is seen as holding great promise for the future.

news.headline: VicOne teams with Microsoft for advanced auto cybersecurity, aiding software devs with improved vehicle protection.
news.summary: In an update from Detroit and Tokyo, VicOne, a prominent provider of automotive cybersecurity solutions, has revealed a new partnership with Microsoft. This collaboration aims to empower developers creating vehicle software by enhancing the security of firmware and guaranteeing comprehensive protection throughout the automotive software's lifespan. The collaboration targets manufacturers of software-defined vehicles (SDVs) and offers unique automotive threat insights, facilitating secure code development, refining continuous integration (CI) practices, and automating security analysis. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in bolstering cybersecurity measures within the automotive industry.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index 69/100 = Greed
Erin Lynch named CEO of CAC Group (includes CAC Specialty and CAC Agency) from Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Denver on January 9th, 2025, the CAC Group, a prominent insurance brokerage consisting of CAC Specialty and CAC Agency, revealed that Erin Lynch, the President of CAC Specialty's Natural Resources Practice, is set to assume the role of Chief Executive Officer for the CAC Group in the initial quarter of 2025. This move marks a significant transition within the company's leadership, with Lynch bringing her expertise to guide the group moving forward.

news.headline: Woolpert awarded contract to collect orthoimagery and lidar for Indiana, boosting statewide GIS initiatives.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made in Indianapolis on January 9, 2025, it was revealed that the Indiana Geographic Information Office (IGIO) has selected Woolpert following a competitive bidding process. The data provided by Woolpert will play a crucial role in supporting IGIO's initiatives related to infrastructure, public safety, and environmental activities across the state. This partnership is expected to significantly impact statewide efforts, with important contributions in various sectors.

news.headline: Asset Management System Market to reach $26.41B by 2030 from $17.64B in 2025, with a CAGR of 8.4% - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts substantial growth in the asset management system market, projecting a rise from USD 17.64 billion in 2025 to an estimated USD 26.41 billion by 2030. This forecast indicates a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.4% from 2025 to 2030. Asset management systems serve as solutions for effective maintenance and monitoring of assets.

news.headline: Sidetrade boosts info security with SOC 1 and SOC 2 Type 2 attestations, and renews ISO 27001 cert for 5th year.
news.summary: Sidetrade, a top provider of AI-driven Order-to-Cash solutions, has achieved SOC 1® Type 2 and SOC 2® Type 2 assurance reports. Additionally, the company has recently renewed its ISO 27001:2022 certification for the fifth year in a row. This underscores Sidetrade's commitment to upholding the highest standards in data security and management.

news.headline: DOJ ends warrantless airport search program after Gray Media investigation seizes millions without arrests.
news.summary: Atlanta, on January 9, 2025, Gray Media (NYSE: GTN) declared the termination of a nationwide search program by the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) following an inquiry by Gray’s InvestigateTV and Atlanta News First Investigates. This program had led to the seizure of an undisclosed amount of cash from airline passengers without any arrests being made.

news.headline: Jacquie Marshall Siegmund promoted to partner at Origin Ventures. #news #promotion
news.summary: New data released today shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.4%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding economists' expectations. This marks a significant improvement in the labor market and provides hope for a strong economic recovery in the coming months. The job gains were widespread across various sectors, with the largest increases seen in the manufacturing and healthcare industries. Analysts are optimistic about the future outlook based on these positive trends.

news.headline: Taste of the NFL 2025 presented by Frito-Lay and partners to combat student hunger, featuring culinary masters and NFL stars in New Orleans.
news.summary: The largest philanthropic event of Super Bowl LIX will be hosted in New Orleans, presented by Frito-Lay, Quaker, and the PepsiCo Foundation. This event promises to combine the expertise of culinary masters and NFL gridiron greats with captivating entertainment, all driven by a strong sense of purpose. Scheduled for January 9, 2025, in New York, this event is set to draw record numbers in attendance and donations.

news.headline: Sevier County, Tenn., partners with Blue Zones for well-being improvement plan aiming to help residents live better, longer.
news.summary: Sevier County in Tennessee has recently partnered with Blue Zones, renowned for its expertise in longevity research and community well-being transformation. The collaboration aims to conduct a comprehensive assessment across the county and develop a comprehensive plan to enhance the quality of life and increase longevity for all residents. This initiative signifies a concerted effort to improve the well-being of all individuals within Sevier County. The assessment and subsequent plan are crucial steps towards fostering healthier and longer lives for the local community.

news.headline: Ovation.io introduces research data set of whole genome sequences and clinical records for GLP-1 patients, aiding precision medicine. #Bioinformatics
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, Ovation has introduced a new dataset focused on GLP-1, incorporating whole genome sequencing (WGS). This dataset aims to facilitate biomarker discovery in efforts to further precision medicine for metabolic diseases.

news.headline: American Injectables in Brooksville, Fla., received FDA approval on Jan. 9, 2025, a crucial milestone for the CDMO specializing in sterile injectables.
news.summary: American Injectables, a CDMO based in Brooksville, Florida, has recently achieved a significant accomplishment by receiving FDA approval on January 9, 2025. This approval is a crucial milestone for the company, which focuses on producing sterile injectables. The FDA approval signifies a pivotal moment for American Injectables, indicating a notable achievement in their operations.

news.headline: CellFE® and Syenex collaborate to combine non-viral gene editing with enveloped viral vectors for advanced cell engineering.
news.summary: In Alameda, California on January 9, 2025, CellFE®, a prominent company in non-viral gene editing technology, and Syenex, a trailblazer in enveloped delivery vectors, unveiled a groundbreaking partnership. They aim to develop a hybrid workflow that merges non-viral and viral methods for gene editing. This collaboration intends to leverage the strengths of each company to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of genetic manipulation. This strategic alliance signifies a new era in genetic research and technology advancement, emphasizing innovation and collaboration in the field. This partnership brings together cutting-edge technologies and expertise to revolutionize gene editing practices.

news.headline: Lids Foundation donates $1 million to Our Military Kids, funding 3,300 activity grants, celebrating OMK's 20th year.
news.summary: Our Military Kids is commemorating two decades of providing support to military families, while the Lids Foundation has surpassed $1 million in donations. This milestone will help fund a total of 3,300 activity grants for Our Military Kids. The organization is based in Oakton, Virginia and the achievement was announced on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: New survey from Rite Aid shows gaps in consumer awareness of pharmacist expertise. Pharmacist visits more frequent than doctor appointments. Karen Staniforth comments.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Rite Aid shared findings from a recent survey aimed at exploring consumer-pharmacist interactions to enhance overall health support. Chief Pharmacy Officer Karen Staniforth highlighted that numerous consumers visit pharmacists more often than healthcare providers due to appointment delays. The survey emphasized the importance of pharmacists in healthcare, revealing that % of participants visit pharmacists routinely. Staniforth stressed the critical role pharmacists play in offering accessible and timely health assistance, aligning with the trend of consumers seeking pharmacist guidance. This underscores the significance of leveraging pharmacists to address various health needs promptly.

news.headline: Clinica Medica Primaria partners with eClinicalWorks & Sunoh.ai for better patient care. Enhanced Spanish interactions reported.
news.summary: eClinicalWorks, a leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that Clinica Medica Primaria de Rising Sun has effectively implemented Sunoh.ai, an AI medical scribe, for optimizing clinical documentation. The practice has noted improvements in patient interactions, especially utilizing Sunoh.ai’s multilingual capabilities for Spanish visits. Clinica Medica Primaria de Rising Sun has experienced enhanced focus on patient care and has successfully saved one-third of their time through this technology.

news.headline: Mark Lazarus named CEO of Comcast's SpinCo, appoints team for media company with USA Network, CNBC, MSNBC, and more.
news.summary: In New York, Mark Lazarus, the incoming CEO of “SpinCo,” Comcast’s upcoming spin-off entity for specific cable networks, revealed new additions to SpinCo's senior leadership team. SpinCo is set to become a major independent publicly traded media firm, encompassing USA Network, CNBC, MSNBC, Oxygen, E!, SYFY, and Golf Channel, in addition to various digital platforms like Fandango, Rotten Tomatoes, GolfNow, and SportsEngine. The leadership team, comprised of key executives, will steer the company as it enters this stage of development.

news.headline: DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV) will announce Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025, followed by a webcast.
news.summary: A prominent software platform for digital media measurement, DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV), disclosed its intention to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 27, 2025, after the market concludes trading. The management team will conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to elaborate on the financial outcomes, recent advancements, and future prospects of DV. This event follows the publication of the financial results, providing investors and analysts insights into DoubleVerify's latest achievements and trajectory.

news.headline: North American telecom, media, and entertainment firms embrace cloud and AI technologies for innovation and CX improvement - ISG report.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, North American companies in the telecom, media, and entertainment industries are incorporating new technologies to drive innovation and enhance customer satisfaction, according to ISG. This trend highlights a significant shift towards modernization and improvement in these sectors.

news.headline: Cypris appoints Chris Staymates as CTO; he was the CIO at Stax, enhancing their AI research platform.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in New York, Cypris, a prominent AI-driven research platform catering to R&D teams, revealed the selection of Chris Staymates as its Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Staymates, who formerly served as the Chief Innovation Officer at Stax, brings valuable expertise to the team. This appointment highlights Cypris' commitment to enhancing its technological capabilities.

news.headline: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Jan 28, 2025, at 10am ET.
news.summary: A conference call has been arranged by Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) in Miami for 10:00 a.m. EST on Tuesday, January 28, 2025, to review the financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The call will also be live-streamed on their website.

news.headline: Nulogy appoints Josh Betz as Chief Revenue Officer to drive revenue growth and scalability. Joined on Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Nulogy, a prominent supplier of collaborative manufacturing supply chain solutions, has welcomed Josh Betz, a seasoned strategic sales executive, to their leadership team in Toronto. This move aims to drive revenue growth and enhance scalability for the company. The announcement was made on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: HACR appoints Thomas Savino as new board chair, serving a two-year term starting Jan. 1, 2025. CEO of Prospanica.
news.summary: The Hispanic Association on Corporate Responsibility (HACR) Board of Directors has announced the appointment of Thomas Savino as the new board chair, effective January 1, 2025. Savino, who is the CEO of Prospanica, will serve a two-year term in this role. This decision was made on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Availity and Concert team up to digitize, automate prior authorization for genetic testing, reduce administrative burden.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between Availity® and Concert®, with Availity® being the primary real-time health information network in the nation and Concert® specializing in clinical content and payment accuracy solutions for advanced diagnostics. The partnership aims to modernize and streamline prior authorization and payment procedures for genetic tests. By working together, they plan to establish a more uniform, clear, and immediate prior authorization system, ultimately cutting down on administrative workload within the genetic testing delivery process.

news.headline: Goertek debuts advanced smart ring designs at CES 2025, leveraging latest tech for health monitoring.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2025, it was reported that remarkable progress in sensing, big data, cloud computing, IoT, and AI has notably bolstered the functionality of wearable devices for health monitoring. At CES 2025, Goertek unveiled its most recent smart ring reference designs, demonstrating the convergence of cutting-edge technologies in this field.

news.headline: JargonAi debuts new investment tool that simplifies SEC filings, aids in tracking public companies, and provides insights.
news.summary: A company based in Eagle, Idaho, called JargonAi (referred to as "Jargon") has unveiled a new investment tool. This tool utilizes artificial intelligence to generate concise summaries of Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) EDGAR filings, simplifying intricate stock market details for users. Through Jargon's advanced interface, individuals can easily identify companies to monitor, keep track of public company developments in real-time, and retrieve current and past filing data. The tool aims to streamline the process of accessing and comprehending financial information, benefiting its users.

news.headline: Goertek introduces Wood2 AR smart glasses at CES 2025, tapping into booming AI eyewear market.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2025, the AI eyewear market is witnessing substantial growth due to the rapid progress of artificial intelligence technology and the increasing popularity of smart devices among consumers. During CES 2025, Goertek Inc. introduced the Wood2, an innovative pair of smart glasses that promises to revolutionize the market. The Wood2 is at the forefront of this surge in demand, highlighting the increasing importance of AI in the tech industry.

news.headline: Tenovos earns AWS Consumer Goods Competency, showcasing expertise in digital asset management industry.
news.summary: Tenovos, a modern digital asset management platform prioritizing data, has recently been acknowledged as an expert in consumer goods by achieving the AWS Consumer Goods Competency. This recognition highlights the platform's proficiency in the consumer goods sector.

news.headline: Hospital economic activity grew in December to 56.3% PMI; 16th month in a row, 35 months of growth prior to that.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona, on January 9, 2025, it was reported that the economic activity within the hospital subsector showed growth in December, marking the 16th straight month of expansion. This growth followed two periods of contraction within the past four months. Prior to this, there were 35 consecutive months of growth in the sector. According to the nation's hospital supply executives, this positive trend indicates a steady recovery and resilience within the industry.

news.headline: Techreviewer.co reveals 2024 IT Labor Market Report insights, showcasing industry trends and challenges impacting tech talent.
news.summary: A recent research article by Techreviewer.co, a prominent IT market analytics and ratings platform, delves into the 2024 IT Labor Market. The report examines industry dynamics, focusing on workforce issues, hiring patterns, and the influence of advancing technologies on talent needs. With in-depth analysis, Techreviewer offers valuable insights for businesses and individuals navigating the rapidly changing IT landscape.

news.headline: American Legion opens submissions for Fourth Estate Awards honoring journalism excellence by March 15, 2025.
news.summary: Indianapolis, as of January 9, 2025 - The renowned Fourth Estate Awards competition, organized by The American Legion, is currently accepting submissions showcasing exceptional journalism and its societal contributions. Journalists are encouraged to submit their work before the deadline on March 15, 2025.

news.headline: Precision BioSciences announces successful clinical response in first infant dosed by partner iECURE in Phase 1/2 trial for OTC deficiency. (Numbers: Nasdaq: DTIL, ECUR-506, OTC-HOPE study)
news.summary: In Durham, NC, Precision BioSciences, Inc. revealed that its partner iECURE shared clinical findings on the first patient treated with ECUR-506 in the Phase 1/2 OTC-HOPE study. The patient was dosed with the in vivo gene insertion program, showing promising efficacy and safety data. Precision BioSciences is a Nasdaq-listed company (DTIL) specializing in gene editing using ARCUS® platform for advanced gene modifications. ECUR-506 aims at gene insertion, excision, and elimination for therapeutic purposes.

news.headline: Cetera Advisors gain advisors with $255M AUA from Osaic; Jennifer Read and Terri Steele lead team.
news.summary: Two financial advisors, Jennifer Read and Terri Steele, have recently joined Cetera Financial Group from Osaic. This move was announced on January 9, 2025, by Cetera Financial Group, known as the premier financial advisor Wealth Hub. Jennifer Read, Terri Steele, and their team are now part of Cetera Advisors. This addition brings significant expertise and experience to the team at Cetera, further enhancing their services in the financial sector.

news.headline: HITN offers free medical support service Pregúntale a Lisa to aid California wildfire victims; includes chat with doctors.
news.summary: In response to the wildfires in Los Angeles County, HITN from Brooklyn, N.Y., is offering aid through its 'Pregúntale a Lisa' service, which includes a free medical support service powered by Vida y Salud. This platform provides users with a chat with doctors and an AI health symptom checker. The service aims to offer accessible and precise medical assistance. Staffed by skilled medical professionals from Vida y Salud, 'Pregúntale a Lisa' is a valuable resource for those affected.

news.headline: Dogecoin down by 7.82% in 24 hours to $0.32 from $0.34; weekly decline of 6.0%. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Over the last 24 hours, the price of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has dropped by 7.82% to $0.32, as part of a downward trend seen in the past week with a decrease of 6.0% from $0.34. Comparing the price movement and volatility for Dogecoin in the last day, a detailed chart is available. For more information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga's website.

news.headline: Richard Burggraf appointed Head of Excess Casualty, U.S. East Zone for AXA XL in New York. Tasked with managing and developing the team.
news.summary: In New York on January 9, 2025, Richard Burggraf was named the new Head of Excess Casualty for the U.S. East Zone. Taking on the role in New York, Burggraf's responsibilities include overseeing and enhancing the Excess Casualty underwriting team to align with and aid the overall North American operations.

news.headline: TransPerfect donated over $65,000 and 5,000+ toys to Toys for Tots, aiding children in need.
news.summary: In a remarkable year of generosity, TransPerfect, the leading provider of language and AI solutions for global businesses, disclosed their contribution to Marine Toys for Tots. The donation, valued at over $65,000, resulted in an impressive collection of 5,000+ toys for underprivileged children. This record-breaking act of giving signifies a significant impact on the community.

news.headline: Radiant Waxing® secures deal for 15 units in Utah with female entrepreneurs, marking major expansion phase.
news.summary: A popular waxing brand called Radiant Waxing® is entering a significant expansion phase with a group of successful female entrepreneurs. The brand offers inclusive and specialized hair removal services and is rapidly growing. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company. The expansion deal, signed in Salt Lake City on January 9, 2025, is the largest in the company's history.

news.headline: Software Defined Automation wins Frost & Sullivan's 2024 Global Entrepreneurial Company of the Year Award for DevOps solutions.
news.summary: A platform by Software Defined Automation is bridging gaps in industrial automation with a unified, cloud-based solution. This platform integrates vendor-specific tools, speeds up workflows, and enhances system security and performance. The innovation was announced in San Antonio on January 9, 2025. This development was highlighted by Frost & Sullivan, a renowned market research firm.

news.headline: Canadian Natural Resources plans $4.2 billion budget for 2025, aiming for 12% production growth with targets like 1,510-1,555 MBOE/d.
news.summary: Canadian Natural Resources (NYSE: CNQ) has finalized its 2025 budget, with an anticipated operating capital budget of approximately C$6 billion (~$4.2 billion). This budget encompasses funds for various acquisitions set to be concluded in the first quarter of 2025, pending regulatory clearances. The primary goal of this budget is to bolster production growth in 2025 and facilitate long-term capacity expansion. The company has also given the green light to allocate C$135 million in capital, with C$90 million directed towards carbon capture projects and C$45 million earmarked for a one-time office relocation endeavor. Canadian Natural Resources is aiming for an annual production range of 1,510 MBOE/d to 1,555 MBOE/d.

news.headline: Medicare now covers Eli Lilly's Zepbound for sleep apnea treatment, enhancing access for obese patients. Approval includes 62.8% reduction in events on apnea-hypopnea index in SURMOUNT-OSA trials.
news.summary: Eli Lilly And Co's obesity drug, Zepbound (tirzepatide), can now be covered by Medicare drug plans for obstructive sleep apnea. This change follows FDA approval of Zepbound in December as the first prescription medicine for adults with moderate-to-severe obstructive sleep apnea and obesity. The drug must be used alongside a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity. In SURMOUNT-OSA phase 3 trials, tirzepatide achieved significant results, with up to a 62.8% reduction in the apnea-hypopnea index (AHI), indicating potential positive outcomes for users. The coverage expansion could enhance access to Zepbound, as it was previously not widely covered by Medicare or other insurance plans for weight loss purposes.

news.headline: Lockmasters acquires Orchard Lock Distributors LLC. Nicholasville, Ky. based company grows under Dominus Capital.
news.summary: Lockmasters, Inc., based in Nicholasville, Kentucky, shared on January 9, 2025, the news of its acquisition of Orchard Lock Distributors LLC. The deal was a significant move for Lockmasters, a company under Dominus Capital, L.P.'s portfolio. Orchard Lock, the recently acquired company, specializes in wholesale distribution. This acquisition marks a strategic growth opportunity for Lockmasters.

news.headline: Guardian members get workplace benefits, access to Peloton App One for well-being. New York, Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: In New York on January 9, 2025, The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America® (Guardian) highlighted the importance of overall well-being by providing access to Peloton App One for its members. This move emphasizes the connection between physical and mental health. The initiative aims to inspire well-being among Guardian members and promote a holistic approach to health.

news.headline: Billtrust achieved milestones in 2024 through AI innovation, boosting cash flow and customer growth.
news.summary: A company based in Hamilton Township, New Jersey, the leading provider of order-to-cash software, has recently released its 2024 business achievements. Billtrust, known for its expertise in B2B order-to-cash and digital payments, shared successful results in aiding companies to improve cash flow, customer growth, and retention. The report, compiled on January 9, 2025, signifies the significant impact made with essential figures demonstrating progress in facilitating customer operations.

news.headline: Akima appoints Rachael Duffy as VP of Marketing, Communications, and Government Relations in Herndon, VA.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in HERNDON, Virginia, Akima, a leading supplier of products and services to the federal government, disclosed the promotion of Rachael Duffy as Vice President of Marketing, Communications, and Government Relations. Duffy will be tasked with managing the company's marketing and government relations strategies.
